revision.text:
{{神社 |名称=軽樹村坐神社 |画像= |所在地=[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]西池尻町178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神=[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] |社格=[[式内社]]（大）
旧[[村社]] |創建=不詳 |本殿=[[春日造]] |例祭=[[10月14日]] |地図= Japan Nara }} '''軽樹村坐神社'''（かるこむらにますじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 祭神 == * '''[[応神天皇|誉田別命]]''' 『五郡神社記』は彦座神と白髪王としている。この二神は『[[新撰姓氏録]]』左京皇別下に「彦座之後世孫白髪王。初彦坐命 未賜阿弥古姓。成務天皇御代賜軽地三千代。是負軽我孫姓之由也」と記載されており、古代豪族である'''軽氏'''（かるのうじ）の祖先を祀ったものとも考えられる。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創始年代は不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』では大社に列格し、月次・新嘗の[[奉幣]]に預ると記されている。その後は次第に衰微し、祭神も不明となり近世まで[[八幡宮]]と称していた。[[旧社格]]は村社に列した。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「軽樹村神」 == 交通アクセス == *[[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[近鉄南大阪線|南大阪線]][[橿原神宮西口駅]]から徒歩5分。 == 関連項目 == *[[大和国の式内社一覧]] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]]

鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地=[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]西池尻町178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神=[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] |社格=[[式内社]]（大2座）
旧[[村社]] |創建=不詳 |本殿=[[春日造]] |例祭=[[10月14日]] |地図= Japan Nara }} '''軽樹村坐神社'''（かるこむらにますじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 祭神 == * '''[[応神天皇|誉田別命]]''' 『五郡神社記』は彦座神と白髪王としている。この二神は『[[新撰姓氏録]]』左京皇別下に「彦座之後世孫白髪王。初彦坐命 未賜阿弥古姓。成務天皇御代賜軽地三千代。是負軽我孫姓之由也」と記載されており、古代豪族である'''軽氏'''（かるのうじ）の祖先を祀ったものとも考えられる。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創始年代は不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』では大社に列格し、月次・新嘗の[[奉幣]]に預ると記されている。その後は次第に衰微し、祭神も不明となり近世まで[[八幡宮]]と称していた。[[旧社格]]は村社に列した。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「軽樹村神」 == 交通アクセス == *[[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[近鉄南大阪線|南大阪線]][[橿原神宮西口駅]]から徒歩5分。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == *[[大和国の式内社一覧]] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]]

{{nihongo|'''Karukomuranimasu Shrine'''|軽樹村坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karukomuranimasu Shrine'''|軽樹村坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karukomuranimasu Shrine'''|軽樹村坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karukomuranimasu Shrine'''|軽樹村坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karukomuranimasu Shrine'''|軽樹村坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karukomuranimasu Shrine'''|軽樹村坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karukomuranimasu Shrine'''|軽樹村坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karukomuranimasu Shrine'''|軽樹村坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karukomuranimasu Shrine'''|軽樹村坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karukomuranimasu Shrine'''|軽樹村坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karukomuranimasu Shrine'''|軽樹村坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karukomuranimasu Shrine'''|軽樹村坐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

revision.comment: 7 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称=軽樹村坐神社 |画像=[[File:Karukomura.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地=[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]西池尻町178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神=[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] |社格=[[式内社]]（大2座）
旧[[村社]] |創建=不詳 |本殿=[[春日造]] |例祭=[[10月14日]] |地図= Japan Nara }} '''軽樹村坐神社'''（かるこむらにますじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 祭神 == * '''[[応神天皇|誉田別命]]''' 『五郡神社記』は彦座神と白髪王としている。この二神は『[[新撰姓氏録]]』左京皇別下に「彦座之後世孫白髪王。初彦坐命 未賜阿弥古姓。成務天皇御代賜軽地三千代。是負軽我孫姓之由也」と記載されており、古代豪族である'''軽氏'''（かるのうじ）の祖先を祀ったものとも考えられる。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創始年代は不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』では大社に列格し、月次・新嘗の[[奉幣]]に預ると記されている。その後は次第に衰微し、祭神も不明となり近世まで[[八幡宮]]と称していた。[[旧社格]]は村社に列した。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「軽樹村神」 == 交通アクセス == *[[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[近鉄南大阪線|南大阪線]][[橿原神宮西口駅]]から徒歩5分。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == *[[大和国の式内社一覧]] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[軽樹村坐神社]] to [[Karukomuranimasu Shrine]] without leaving a redirect: Merging Japanese Wikipedia import with English content

旧[[村社]] |創建=不詳 |本殿=[[春日造]] |例祭=[[10月14日]] |地図= Japan Nara }} '''軽樹村坐神社'''（かるこむらにますじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 祭神 == * '''[[応神天皇|誉田別命]]''' 『五郡神社記』は彦座神と白髪王としている。この二神は『[[新撰姓氏録]]』左京皇別下に「彦座之後世孫白髪王。初彦坐命 未賜阿弥古姓。成務天皇御代賜軽地三千代。是負軽我孫姓之由也」と記載されており、古代豪族である'''軽氏'''（かるのうじ）の祖先を祀ったものとも考えられる。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創始年代は不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』では大社に列格し、月次・新嘗の[[奉幣]]に預ると記されている。その後は次第に衰微し、祭神も不明となり近世まで[[八幡宮]]と称していた。[[旧社格]]は村社に列した。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「軽樹村神」 == 交通アクセス == *[[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[近鉄南大阪線|南大阪線]][[橿原神宮西口駅]]から徒歩5分。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == *[[大和国の式内社一覧]] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]]

Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称=軽樹村坐神社 |画像=[[File:Karukomura.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地=[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]西池尻町178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神=[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] |社格=[[式内社]]（大2座）
旧[[村社]] |創建=不詳 |本殿=[[春日造]] |例祭=[[10月14日]] |地図= Japan Nara }} '''軽樹村坐神社'''（かるこむらにますじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 祭神 == * '''[[応神天皇|誉田別命]]''' 『五郡神社記』は彦座神と白髪王としている。この二神は『[[新撰姓氏録]]』左京皇別下に「彦座之後世孫白髪王。初彦坐命 未賜阿弥古姓。成務天皇御代賜軽地三千代。是負軽我孫姓之由也」と記載されており、古代豪族である'''軽氏'''（かるのうじ）の祖先を祀ったものとも考えられる。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創始年代は不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』では大社に列格し、月次・新嘗の[[奉幣]]に預ると記されている。その後は次第に衰微し、祭神も不明となり近世まで[[八幡宮]]と称していた。[[旧社格]]は村社に列した。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「軽樹村神」 == 交通アクセス == *[[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[近鉄南大阪線|南大阪線]][[橿原神宮西口駅]]から徒歩5分。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == *[[大和国の式内社一覧]] {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] ==End Japanese==

Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称=軽樹村坐神社 |画像=[[File:Karukomura.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地=[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]西池尻町178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神=[[応神天皇|誉田別命]] |社格=[[式内社]]（大2座）
旧[[村社]] |創建=不詳 |本殿=[[春日造]] |例祭=[[10月14日]] |地図= Japan Nara }} '''軽樹村坐神社'''（かるこむらにますじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]。 == 祭神 == * '''[[応神天皇|誉田別命]]''' 『五郡神社記』は彦座神と白髪王としている。この二神は『[[新撰姓氏録]]』左京皇別下に「彦座之後世孫白髪王。初彦坐命 未賜阿弥古姓。成務天皇御代賜軽地三千代。是負軽我孫姓之由也」と記載されており、古代豪族である'''軽氏'''（かるのうじ）の祖先を祀ったものとも考えられる。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創始年代は不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』では大社に列格し、月次・新嘗の[[奉幣]]に預ると記されている。その後は次第に衰微し、祭神も不明となり近世まで[[八幡宮]]と称していた。[[旧社格]]は村社に列した。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「軽樹村神」 == 交通アクセス == *[[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[近鉄南大阪線|南大阪線]][[橿原神宮西口駅]]から徒歩5分。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == *[[大和国の式内社一覧]] {{神道 横}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]]

receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Kanpei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|軽樹村坐神社|version=106919023|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称=軽樹村坐神社 |画像=[[File:Karukomura.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}西池尻町178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神={{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997|誉田別命}} |社格={{jalink|式内社}}（大2座）
旧{{jalink|村社}} |創建=不詳 |本殿={{jalink|春日造|Q3193781}} |例祭={{jalink|10月14日|Q2922}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''軽樹村坐神社'''（かるこむらにますじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内大社|Q134917288}}で、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|村社}}。 == 祭神 == * '''{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997|誉田別命}}''' 『五郡神社記』は彦座神と白髪王としている。この二神は『{{jalink|新撰姓氏録|Q1045362}}』左京皇別下に「彦座之後世孫白髪王。初彦坐命 未賜阿弥古姓。成務天皇御代賜軽地三千代。是負軽我孫姓之由也」と記載されており、古代豪族である'''軽氏'''（かるのうじ）の祖先を祀ったものとも考えられる。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創始年代は不詳。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』では大社に列格し、月次・新嘗の{{jalink|奉幣|Q11445508}}に預ると記されている。その後は次第に衰微し、祭神も不明となり近世まで{{jalink|八幡宮|Q11390939}}と称していた。{{jalink|旧社格}}は村社に列した。 === 神階 === * {{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下から従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』）- 表記は「軽樹村神」 == 交通アクセス == *{{jalink|近畿日本鉄道|Q1531085|近鉄}}{{jalink|近鉄南大阪線|Q901342|南大阪線}}{{jalink|橿原神宮西口駅|Q6374284}}から徒歩5分。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == *{{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427}} {{神道 横}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]]

'奈良県橿原市西池尻町178', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:軽樹村坐神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153276}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称=軽樹村坐神社 |画像=[[File:Karukomura.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}西池尻町178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神={{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997|誉田別命}} |社格={{jalink|式内社}}（大2座）
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建=不詳 |本殿={{jalink|春日造|Q3193781}} |例祭={{jalink|10月14日|Q2922}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''軽樹村坐神社'''（かるこむらにますじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内大社|Q134917288}}で、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === * '''{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997|誉田別命}}''' 『五郡神社記』は彦座神と白髪王としている。この二神は『{{jalink|新撰姓氏録|Q1045362}}』左京皇別下に「彦座之後世孫白髪王。初彦坐命 未賜阿弥古姓。成務天皇御代賜軽地三千代。是負軽我孫姓之由也」と記載されており、古代豪族である'''軽氏'''（かるのうじ）の祖先を祀ったものとも考えられる。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 創始年代は不詳。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』では大社に列格し、月次・新嘗の{{jalink|奉幣|Q11445508}}に預ると記されている。その後は次第に衰微し、祭神も不明となり近世まで{{jalink|八幡宮|Q11390939}}と称していた。{{jalink|旧社格}}は村社に列した。 === 神階 === * {{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下から従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』）- 表記は「軽樹村神」 === 交通アクセス === *{{jalink|近畿日本鉄道|Q1531085|近鉄}}{{jalink|近鉄南大阪線|Q901342|南大阪線}}{{jalink|橿原神宮西口駅|Q6374284}}から徒歩5分。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 関連項目 === *{{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

(Japan) (P3225) == * 1150005004930 == has part(s) (P527) == * {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|WD=Q135018062}} ** P1114: {'amount': '+2', 'unit': '1'} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県橿原市西池尻町178', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:軽樹村坐神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153276}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称=軽樹村坐神社 |画像=[[File:Karukomura.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}西池尻町178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神={{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997|誉田別命}} |社格={{jalink|式内社}}（大2座）
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建=不詳 |本殿={{jalink|春日造|Q3193781}} |例祭={{jalink|10月14日|Q2922}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''軽樹村坐神社'''（かるこむらにますじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内大社|Q134917288}}で、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === * '''{{jalink|応神天皇|Q317997|誉田別命}}''' 『五郡神社記』は彦座神と白髪王としている。この二神は『{{jalink|新撰姓氏録|Q1045362}}』左京皇別下に「彦座之後世孫白髪王。初彦坐命 未賜阿弥古姓。成務天皇御代賜軽地三千代。是負軽我孫姓之由也」と記載されており、古代豪族である'''軽氏'''（かるのうじ）の祖先を祀ったものとも考えられる。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 創始年代は不詳。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』では大社に列格し、月次・新嘗の{{jalink|奉幣|Q11445508}}に預ると記されている。その後は次第に衰微し、祭神も不明となり近世まで{{jalink|八幡宮|Q11390939}}と称していた。{{jalink|旧社格}}は村社に列した。 === 神階 === * {{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下から従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』）- 表記は「軽樹村神」 === 交通アクセス === *{{jalink|近畿日本鉄道|Q1531085|近鉄}}{{jalink|近鉄南大阪線|Q901342|南大阪線}}{{jalink|橿原神宮西口駅|Q6374284}}から徒歩5分。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 関連項目 === *{{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

Torii and worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Kashihara, Nara|Q496319}} Nishiikejiri-chō 178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神={{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} |社格={{jalink|Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288}} (2 seats)
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建=unknown |本殿={{jalink|Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781}} |例祭={{jalink|October 14|Q2922}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Karukomuranimasu Shrine''' (かるこむらにますじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kashihara, Nara|Q496319}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288}}, and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}''' ''Gogun Jinjaki'' identifies the deities as Hikoza-no-Kami and Shiraga-no-Ō. These two are described in the ''{{jalink|Shinsen Shōjiroku|Q1045362}}'' (Sakyō, imperial branch, lower rank): "Shiraga-no-Ō, descendant of Hikoza... in the reign of Emperor Seimu, was granted 3,000 yo of Karu land... hence bore the surname Karu no Agaso," and they are also considered to be ancestors enshrined by the ancient Karu clan. === History === === General history === The founding era is unknown. In the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'' it is listed as a major shrine, receiving offerings for Tsukinami and Niiname rites. Afterward it gradually declined, and even its enshrined deity became unknown; it was called {{jalink|Hachiman-gū|Q11390939}} until early modern times. Under the {{jalink|former shrine ranking system}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{jalink|859|Q23897}} (Ten'an 3), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284}} on the {{jalink|Minami Osaka Line|Q901342}} of {{jalink|Kintetsu|Q1531085}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{jalink|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

https://web.archive.org/web/20041123011554/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22815 == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 180827 ** P3831: (Japan) (P3225) == * 1150005004930 == has part(s) (P527) == * {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|WD=Q135018062}} ** P1114: {'amount': '+2', 'unit': '1'} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県橿原市西池尻町178', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:軽樹村坐神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153276}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称=Karukomuranimasu Shrine |画像=[[File:Karukomura.jpg|270px]]
Torii and worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Kashihara, Nara|Q496319}} Nishiikejiri-chō 178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神={{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} |社格={{jalink|Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288}} (2 seats)
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建=unknown |本殿={{jalink|Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781}} |例祭={{jalink|October 14|Q2922}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Karukomuranimasu Shrine''' (かるこむらにますじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kashihara, Nara|Q496319}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288}}, and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}''' ''Gogun Jinjaki'' identifies the deities as Hikoza-no-Kami and Shiraga-no-Ō. These two are described in the ''{{jalink|Shinsen Shōjiroku|Q1045362}}'' (Sakyō, imperial branch, lower rank): "Shiraga-no-Ō, descendant of Hikoza... in the reign of Emperor Seimu, was granted 3,000 yo of Karu land... hence bore the surname Karu no Agaso," and they are also considered to be ancestors enshrined by the ancient Karu clan. === History === === General history === The founding era is unknown. In the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'' it is listed as a major shrine, receiving offerings for Tsukinami and Niiname rites. Afterward it gradually declined, and even its enshrined deity became unknown; it was called {{jalink|Hachiman-gū|Q11390939}} until early modern times. Under the {{jalink|former shrine ranking system}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{jalink|859|Q23897}} (Ten'an 3), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284}} on the {{jalink|Minami Osaka Line|Q901342}} of {{jalink|Kintetsu|Q1531085}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{jalink|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Kashihara, Nara|Q496319}} Nishiikejiri-chō 178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神={{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} |社格={{jalink|Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288}} (2 seats)
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建=unknown |本殿={{jalink|Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781}} |例祭={{jalink|October 14|Q2922}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Karukomuranimasu Shrine''' (かるこむらにますじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kashihara, Nara|Q496319}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288}}, and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}''' ''Gogun Jinjaki'' identifies the deities as Hikoza-no-Kami and Shiraga-no-Ō. These two are described in the ''{{jalink|Shinsen Shōjiroku|Q1045362}}'' (Sakyō, imperial branch, lower rank): "Shiraga-no-Ō, descendant of Hikoza... in the reign of Emperor Seimu, was granted 3,000 yo of Karu land... hence bore the surname Karu no Agaso," and they are also considered to be ancestors enshrined by the ancient Karu clan. === History === === General history === The founding era is unknown. In the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'' it is listed as a major shrine, receiving offerings for Tsukinami and Niiname rites. Afterward it gradually declined, and even its enshrined deity became unknown; it was called {{jalink|Hachiman-gū|Q11390939}} until early modern times. Under the {{jalink|former shrine ranking system}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{jalink|859|Q23897}} (Ten'an 3), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284}} on the {{jalink|Minami Osaka Line|Q901342}} of {{jalink|Kintetsu|Q1531085}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{jalink|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]]

'奈良県橿原市西池尻町178', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:軽樹村坐神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153276}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称=Karukomuranimasu Shrine |画像=[[File:Karukomura.jpg|270px]]
Torii and worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Kashihara, Nara|Q496319}} Nishiikejiri-chō 178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神={{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} |社格={{jalink|Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288}} (2 seats)
former {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}} |創建=unknown |本殿={{jalink|Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781}} |例祭={{jalink|October 14|Q2922}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Karukomuranimasu Shrine''' (かるこむらにますじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kashihara, Nara|Q496319}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288}}, and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|Sonsha|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''{{jalink|Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}''' ''Gogun Jinjaki'' identifies the deities as Hikoza-no-Kami and Shiraga-no-Ō. These two are described in the ''{{jalink|Shinsen Shōjiroku|Q1045362}}'' (Sakyō, imperial branch, lower rank): "Shiraga-no-Ō, descendant of Hikoza... in the reign of Emperor Seimu, was granted 3,000 yo of Karu land... hence bore the surname Karu no Agaso," and they are also considered to be ancestors enshrined by the ancient Karu clan. === History === === General history === The founding era is unknown. In the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'' it is listed as a major shrine, receiving offerings for Tsukinami and Niiname rites. Afterward it gradually declined, and even its enshrined deity became unknown; it was called {{jalink|Hachiman-gū|Q11390939}} until early modern times. Under the {{jalink|former shrine ranking system}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{jalink|859|Q23897}} (Ten'an 3), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284}} on the {{jalink|Minami Osaka Line|Q901342}} of {{jalink|Kintetsu|Q1531085}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{jalink|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:nnnnnnnnn]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara, Nara|Q496319|WD=Q496319}} Nishiikejiri-chō 178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} |社格={{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288}} (2 seats)
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建=unknown |本殿={{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781}} |例祭={{ill|lt=October 14|Q2922|WD=Q2922}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Karukomuranimasu Shrine''' (かるこむらにますじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Kashihara, Nara|Q496319|WD=Q496319}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}''' ''Gogun Jinjaki'' identifies the deities as Hikoza-no-Kami and Shiraga-no-Ō. These two are described in the ''{{ill|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|Q1045362|WD=Q1045362}}'' (Sakyō, imperial branch, lower rank): "Shiraga-no-Ō, descendant of Hikoza... in the reign of Emperor Seimu, was granted 3,000 yo of Karu land... hence bore the surname Karu no Agaso," and they are also considered to be ancestors enshrined by the ancient Karu clan. === History === === General history === The founding era is unknown. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}'' it is listed as a major shrine, receiving offerings for Tsukinami and Niiname rites. Afterward it gradually declined, and even its enshrined deity became unknown; it was called {{ill|lt=Hachiman-gū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939}} until early modern times. Under the {{ill||lt=former shrine ranking system|UNKNOWN}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}} (Ten'an 3), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284|WD=Q6374284}} on the {{ill|lt=Minami Osaka Line|Q901342|WD=Q901342}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:nnnnnnnnn]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Under the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine ranking system|1=UNKNOWN}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}} (Ten'an 3), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284|WD=Q6374284}} on the {{ill|lt=Minami Osaka Line|Q901342|WD=Q901342}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:nnnnnnnnn]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara, Nara|Q496319|WD=Q496319}} Nishiikejiri-chō 178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} |社格={{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288}} (2 seats)
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建=unknown |本殿={{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781}} |例祭={{ill|lt=October 14|Q2922|WD=Q2922}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Karukomuranimasu Shrine''' (かるこむらにますじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Kashihara, Nara|Q496319|WD=Q496319}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto}}''' ''Gogun Jinjaki'' identifies the deities as Hikoza-no-Kami and Shiraga-no-Ō. These two are described in the ''{{ill|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|Q1045362|WD=Q1045362}}'' (Sakyō, imperial branch, lower rank): "Shiraga-no-Ō, descendant of Hikoza... in the reign of Emperor Seimu, was granted 3,000 yo of Karu land... hence bore the surname Karu no Agaso," and they are also considered to be ancestors enshrined by the ancient Karu clan. === History === === General history === The founding era is unknown. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}'' it is listed as a major shrine, receiving offerings for Tsukinami and Niiname rites. Afterward it gradually declined, and even its enshrined deity became unknown; it was called {{ill|lt=Hachiman-gū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939}} until early modern times. Under the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine ranking system|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q712534}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}} (Ten'an 3), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284|WD=Q6374284}} on the {{ill|lt=Minami Osaka Line|Q901342|WD=Q901342}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:nnnnnnnnn]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara, Nara|Q496319|WD=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}} Nishiikejiri-chō 178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} |社格={{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}} (2 seats)
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建=unknown |本殿={{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |例祭={{ill|lt=October 14|Q2922|WD=Q2922|1=October 14}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Karukomuranimasu Shrine''' (かるこむらにますじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Kashihara, Nara|Q496319|WD=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}''' ''Gogun Jinjaki'' identifies the deities as Hikoza-no-Kami and Shiraga-no-Ō. These two are described in the ''{{ill|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|Q1045362|WD=Q1045362|1=Shinsen Shōjiroku}}'' (Sakyō, imperial branch, lower rank): "Shiraga-no-Ō, descendant of Hikoza... in the reign of Emperor Seimu, was granted 3,000 yo of Karu land... hence bore the surname Karu no Agaso," and they are also considered to be ancestors enshrined by the ancient Karu clan. === History === === General history === The founding era is unknown. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'' it is listed as a major shrine, receiving offerings for Tsukinami and Niiname rites. Afterward it gradually declined, and even its enshrined deity became unknown; it was called {{ill|lt=Hachiman-gū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}} until early modern times. Under the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine ranking system|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}} (Ten'an 3), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284|WD=Q6374284|1=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Minami Osaka Line|Q901342|WD=Q901342|1=Minami Osaka Line}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|1=Kintetsu Railway}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:nnnnnnnnn]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

link|Q54153276}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称=Karukomuranimasu Shrine |画像=[[File:Karukomura.jpg|270px]]
Torii and worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara, Nara|Q496319|WD=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}} Nishiikejiri-chō 178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} |社格={{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}} (2 seats)
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建=unknown |本殿={{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |例祭={{ill|lt=October 14|Q2922|WD=Q2922|1=October 14}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Karukomuranimasu Shrine''' (かるこむらにますじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Kashihara, Nara|Q496319|WD=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}''' ''Gogun Jinjaki'' identifies the deities as Hikoza-no-Kami and Shiraga-no-Ō. These two are described in the ''{{ill|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|Q1045362|WD=Q1045362|1=Shinsen Shōjiroku}}'' (Sakyō, imperial branch, lower rank): "Shiraga-no-Ō, descendant of Hikoza... in the reign of Emperor Seimu, was granted 3,000 yo of Karu land... hence bore the surname Karu no Agaso," and they are also considered to be ancestors enshrined by the ancient Karu clan. === History === === General history === The founding era is unknown. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'' it is listed as a major shrine, receiving offerings for Tsukinami and Niiname rites. Afterward it gradually declined, and even its enshrined deity became unknown; it was called {{ill|lt=Hachiman-gū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}} until early modern times. Under the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine ranking system|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}} (Ten'an 3), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284|WD=Q6374284|1=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Minami Osaka Line|Q901342|WD=Q901342|1=Minami Osaka Line}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|1=Kintetsu Railway}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かるこむらにますしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:nnnnnnnnn]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Torii and worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara, Nara|Q496319|WD=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}} Nishiikejiri-chō 178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} |社格={{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}} (2 seats)
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建=unknown |本殿={{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |例祭={{ill|lt=October 14|Q2922|WD=Q2922|1=October 14}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Karukomuranimasu Shrine''' (かるこむらにますじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Kashihara, Nara|Q496319|WD=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}''' ''Gogun Jinjaki'' identifies the deities as Hikoza-no-Kami and Shiraga-no-Ō. These two are described in the ''{{ill|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|Q1045362|WD=Q1045362|1=Shinsen Shōjiroku}}'' (Sakyō, imperial branch, lower rank): "Shiraga-no-Ō, descendant of Hikoza... in the reign of Emperor Seimu, was granted 3,000 yo of Karu land... hence bore the surname Karu no Agaso," and they are also considered to be ancestors enshrined by the ancient Karu clan. === History === === General history === The founding era is unknown. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'' it is listed as a major shrine, receiving offerings for Tsukinami and Niiname rites. Afterward it gradually declined, and even its enshrined deity became unknown; it was called {{ill|lt=Hachiman-gū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}} until early modern times. Under the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine ranking system|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}} (Ten'an 3), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284|WD=Q6374284|1=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Minami Osaka Line|Q901342|WD=Q901342|1=Minami Osaka Line}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|1=Kintetsu Railway}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:nnnnnnnnn]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara, Nara|Q496319|WD=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}} Nishiikejiri-chō 178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} |社格={{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}} (2 seats)
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建=unknown |本殿={{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |例祭={{ill|lt=October 14|Q2922|WD=Q2922|1=October 14}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Karukomuranimasu Shrine''' (かるこむらにますじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Kashihara, Nara|Q496319|WD=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}''' ''Gogun Jinjaki'' identifies the deities as Hikoza-no-Kami and Shiraga-no-Ō. These two are described in the ''{{ill|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|Q1045362|WD=Q1045362|1=Shinsen Shōjiroku}}'' (Sakyō, imperial branch, lower rank): "Shiraga-no-Ō, descendant of Hikoza... in the reign of Emperor Seimu, was granted 3,000 yo of Karu land... hence bore the surname Karu no Agaso," and they are also considered to be ancestors enshrined by the ancient Karu clan. === History === === General history === The founding era is unknown. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'' it is listed as a major shrine, receiving offerings for Tsukinami and Niiname rites. Afterward it gradually declined, and even its enshrined deity became unknown; it was called {{ill|lt=Hachiman-gū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}} until early modern times. Under the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine ranking system|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}} (Ten'an 3), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284|WD=Q6374284|1=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Minami Osaka Line|Q901342|WD=Q901342|1=Minami Osaka Line}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|1=Kintetsu Railway}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:式内大社]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:nnnnnnnnn]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara, Nara|Q496319|WD=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}} Nishiikejiri-chō 178 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 7 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 46 | 経度秒 = 42 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神={{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} |社格={{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}} (2 seats)
former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建=unknown |本殿={{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |例祭={{ill|lt=October 14|Q2922|WD=Q2922|1=October 14}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Karukomuranimasu Shrine''' (かるこむらにますじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Kashihara, Nara|Q496319|WD=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}''' ''Gogun Jinjaki'' identifies the deities as Hikoza-no-Kami and Shiraga-no-Ō. These two are described in the ''{{ill|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|Q1045362|WD=Q1045362|1=Shinsen Shōjiroku}}'' (Sakyō, imperial branch, lower rank): "Shiraga-no-Ō, descendant of Hikoza... in the reign of Emperor Seimu, was granted 3,000 yo of Karu land... hence bore the surname Karu no Agaso," and they are also considered to be ancestors enshrined by the ancient Karu clan. === History === === General history === The founding era is unknown. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'' it is listed as a major shrine, receiving offerings for Tsukinami and Niiname rites. Afterward it gradually declined, and even its enshrined deity became unknown; it was called {{ill|lt=Hachiman-gū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}} until early modern times. Under the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine ranking system|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}} (Ten'an 3), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284|WD=Q6374284|1=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Minami Osaka Line|Q901342|WD=Q901342|1=Minami Osaka Line}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|1=Kintetsu Railway}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:nnnnnnnnn]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}''' ''Gogun Jinjaki'' identifies the deities as Hikoza-no-Kami and Shiraga-no-Ō. These two are described in the ''{{ill|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|Q1045362|WD=Q1045362|1=Shinsen Shōjiroku}}'' (Sakyō, imperial branch, lower rank): "Shiraga-no-Ō, descendant of Hikoza... in the reign of Emperor Seimu, was granted 3,000 yo of Karu land... hence bore the surname Karu no Agaso," and they are also considered to be ancestors enshrined by the ancient Karu clan. === History === === General history === The founding era is unknown. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'' it is listed as a major shrine, receiving offerings for Tsukinami and Niiname rites. Afterward it gradually declined, and even its enshrined deity became unknown; it was called {{ill|lt=Hachiman-gū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}} until early modern times. Under the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine ranking system|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}} (Ten'an 3), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284|WD=Q6374284|1=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Minami Osaka Line|Q901342|WD=Q901342|1=Minami Osaka Line}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|1=Kintetsu Railway}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Kashihara, Nara]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinai Taisha|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|WD=Q317997|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}''' ''Gogun Jinjaki'' identifies the deities as Hikoza-no-Kami and Shiraga-no-Ō. These two are described in the ''{{ill|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|Q1045362|WD=Q1045362|1=Shinsen Shōjiroku}}'' (Sakyō, imperial branch, lower rank): "Shiraga-no-Ō, descendant of Hikoza... in the reign of Emperor Seimu, was granted 3,000 yo of Karu land... hence bore the surname Karu no Agaso," and they are also considered to be ancestors enshrined by the ancient Karu clan. === History === === General history === The founding era is unknown. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'' it is listed as a major shrine, receiving offerings for Tsukinami and Niiname rites. Afterward it gradually declined, and even its enshrined deity became unknown; it was called {{ill|lt=Hachiman-gū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}} until early modern times. Under the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine ranking system|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}} (Ten'an 3), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284|WD=Q6374284|1=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Minami Osaka Line|Q901342|WD=Q901342|1=Minami Osaka Line}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|1=Kintetsu Railway}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Kashihara, Nara]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]]

These two are described in the ''{{ill|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|Q1045362|WD=Q1045362|1=Shinsen Shōjiroku}}'' (Sakyō, imperial branch, lower rank): "Shiraga-no-Ō, descendant of Hikoza... in the reign of Emperor Seimu, was granted 3,000 yo of Karu land... hence bore the surname Karu no Agaso," and they are also considered to be ancestors enshrined by the ancient Karu clan. === History === === General history === The founding era is unknown. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'' it is listed as a major shrine, receiving offerings for Tsukinami and Niiname rites. Afterward it gradually declined, and even its enshrined deity became unknown; it was called {{ill|lt=Hachiman-gū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}} until early modern times. Under the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine ranking system|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|WD=Q712534}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}} (Ten'an 3), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284|WD=Q6374284|1=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Minami Osaka Line|Q901342|WD=Q901342|1=Minami Osaka Line}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|1=Kintetsu Railway}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kashihara, Nara]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]]

Under the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine ranking system|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qid=Q712534}}, it was listed as a village shrine. === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=859|Q23897|qid=Q23897|1=859}} (Ten'an 3), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|qid=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|qid=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - written as "Karukomura no Kami" === Access === *5 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station|Q6374284|qid=Q6374284|1=Kashiharajingū-nishiguchi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Minami Osaka Line|Q901342|qid=Q901342|1=Minami Osaka Line}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|qid=Q1531085|1=Kintetsu Railway}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === *{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Karukomuranimasu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kashihara, Nara]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]]
